test.name: FamilySearch wiki — Irish immigration
test.description: A FamilySearch wiki search on a migration research topic. Confirms the skill handles a single-result response and still produces a sourced summary file.

input.user_message: Search the FamilySearch wiki about Irish immigration to Pennsylvania

judge_context: The fixture chunk says 'Parish registers from Catholic churches in these communities are key genealogical sources'. The skill must preserve the word 'key' — do NOT accept 'primary', 'most important', 'essential', or any superlative upgrade. If the skill uses an upgraded term, score Summary faithful as 2 (partial).
Minor rephrasing that preserves 'key' is acceptable — e.g. 'are key sources' or 'are key genealogical resources' are faithful enough to score 3.
Only one result is returned by the fixture — the Sources section must contain exactly one bullet citing it.
